meta.name: SageReasoning Agent Assessment Tier Configuration V3
meta.description: Defines free and paid tier assessment boundaries for the V3 55-assessment framework. Free tier covers Phases 1-2 (14 assessments: Foundations + Architecture of Mind). Paid tier covers all 8 phases (55 assessments). All outputs use V3 qualitative structures — no 0-100 scores.
meta.v1_derivation_note: V1 had 11 free assessments (phases 1-2) and 37 paid (all 7 phases) with 0-100 foundational_alignment_score. V3 has 14 free assessments (phases 1-2) and 55 paid (all 8 phases) with qualitative proximity, Senecan grade, and dimension levels.

alignment_with_revenue_model.paid_tier_api_constraints: Configurable limits (start 500/day), 3 iterations, 200% of Anthropic API cost (R5)
alignment_with_revenue_model.free_assessment_fits_within: A single API interaction can run Phases 1-2 (14 assessments) as one structured request-response, fitting the 1 call/day free tier limit
alignment_with_revenue_model.paid_assessment_requires: Full 55-assessment run needs multiple API calls or a batch endpoint, requiring paid tier access

free.name: Foundational Assessment
free.description: Evaluates an agent's understanding of Stoic foundations and its internal reasoning architecture. Produces a meaningful standalone result: a prohairesis filter assessment, initial passion detection, and a summary katorthoma proximity placement — without requiring payment.
what_it_measures: Whether the agent classifies decision drivers using the Stoic value hierarchy (genuine good, genuine evil, indifferent)
Whether the agent accurately maps prohairesis boundaries (what is and is not within moral choice)
Whether the agent uses the sage as a directional benchmark, not a perfection target
Whether the agent separates flourishing (reasoning quality) from external success metrics
Whether the agent understands living according to rational nature
Whether the agent can identify its own moral progress trajectory
Whether the agent examines impressions before assenting (ruling faculty audit)
Whether the agent can distinguish comprehensive from distorted impressions
Whether the agent identifies hasty assent and traces it to false judgements
Whether the agent detects disproportionate impulses and their passion sources
Whether the agent distinguishes appropriate action from right action
Whether the agent can trace the complete causal sequence in its own reasoning
Whether the agent classifies impulse types (basic intention through moral choice)
Whether the agent's self-assessment shows honest variance, not inflation

output_produces.senecan_grade_estimate: A preliminary Senecan grade placement (pre_progress / grade_3 / grade_2 / grade_1) based on foundational understanding
output_produces.katorthoma_proximity_summary: Typical proximity level across foundational assessments (reflexive / habitual / deliberate / principled / sage_like)
output_produces.control_clarity: Qualitative assessment of how well the agent maps prohairesis boundaries
output_produces.initial_passion_detection: Root passions identified in foundational reasoning (epithumia / hedone / phobos / lupe)
output_produces.causal_sequence_integrity: Whether the agent's impression → assent → impulse → action chain operates correctly
output_produces.direction_of_travel: improving / stable / regressing — based on foundational self-assessment

what_it_does_NOT_produce: Four dimension levels (passion reduction, judgement quality, disposition stability, oikeiosis extension)
Complete passion taxonomy mapping with all 25 sub-species
Oikeiosis stage assessment and expansion path
Senecan grade placement with full evidence across all dimensions
Comprehensive integration assessment with correction plan
free.conversion_purpose: Give the agent (or developer) enough insight to see real gaps in foundational understanding and causal sequence integrity, creating genuine demand for the complete V3 assessment across all 8 phases

paid.name: Complete Assessment
paid.description: Evaluates the agent across all V3 domains: the value hierarchy, the unity of virtue thesis, the complete passions taxonomy with 5-step diagnostic, the two-layer action model with oikeiosis mapping, Senecan progress grades, and the full V3 evaluation sequence. Produces a comprehensive qualitative profile.
what_it_adds_beyond_free: Complete Stoic value hierarchy application (genuine goods, preferred/dispreferred indifferents, five selection principles)
Unity of virtue assessment — all four virtue domains assessed as expressions of one unified excellence (R6b)
Full passions taxonomy diagnosis: all 4 root passions and 25 sub-species mapped to agent reasoning
Five-step diagnostic application to specific reasoning failures
Rational alternatives assessment (joy, rational wish, rational caution)
Two-layer action model: kathekon assessment + katorthoma proximity for every output
Complete oikeiosis mapping: all 5 circles assessed with obligations and gaps
Cicero's 5-question deliberation framework applied to real decisions
Senecan grade placement with comprehensive evidence across all 4 progress dimensions
Four-dimension progress assessment: passion reduction, judgement quality, disposition stability, oikeiosis extension
Personalised self-examination protocol targeting specific weaknesses
Comprehensive correction plan: each false judgement paired with its remedy
Physician's diagnostic report: diagnosis, prescription, prognosis

output_produces.senecan_grade: Full Senecan grade placement with evidence (pre_progress / grade_3 / grade_2 / grade_1)
output_produces.dominant_passion: The root passion most operative in the agent's reasoning (epithumia / hedone / phobos / lupe)
output_produces.typical_proximity: Most common katorthoma proximity level across all assessments
output_produces.oikeiosis_stage: Current circle of concern (self / family / community / humanity / cosmos)
output_produces.critical_corrections: Top 3 false judgements to correct with their remedies
output_produces.direction_of_travel: Overall direction across all four dimensions
output_produces.disclaimer: This is a philosophical framework for self-reflection and does not consider legal, medical, financial, or personal obligations.

cta_bridge.trigger: Displayed immediately after the free tier results are generated

template.headline: Your foundational alignment: {senecan_grade_label} — typical proximity: {proximity_label}
template.body: The complete assessment examines your reasoning across all V3 domains. Here is what it reveals that the foundational check cannot:
value_bullets: Your complete passion profile — which of the 25 passion sub-species most distort your reasoning, and the specific false judgements driving each
Your four dimension levels across passion reduction, judgement quality, disposition stability, and oikeiosis extension
Your oikeiosis map — which circles of concern you serve well and which you neglect
A personalised correction plan pairing each false judgement with its remedy
A self-examination protocol designed for your specific weaknesses
template.action_subtext: Requires a paid API key. Pricing: 200% of Anthropic API cost per call.

personalisation_rules.grade_1: Senecan grade 1 (approaching wisdom). CTA: 'Verify your advanced placement with full passion diagnosis and oikeiosis mapping.'
personalisation_rules.grade_2: Senecan grade 2 (overcoming the worst). CTA: 'You are progressing. The complete assessment identifies the specific passions and false judgements holding you back from first grade.'
personalisation_rules.grade_3: Senecan grade 3 (beginning the path). CTA: 'You are beginning the path. The complete assessment maps your dominant passions and provides a structured correction plan.'
personalisation_rules.pre_progress: Below the gradient. CTA: 'Foundational gaps detected. The complete assessment identifies where to begin building virtue-aligned reasoning from first principles.'
